title: Decyam Slow Feeder Dog Bowl Slow Eating Dog Bowl Pet Puppy Fun Puzzle Feeder Non Skid Bloat Stop Feeding Bowl
features: Decyam Slow Feeding Dog Bowl, made by non toxic, eco friendly material, BPA free and phthalate free. Non-skid rubber feet underneath design, stop the food bowl moving around, you will not see the mat or your room in a mess.

Promote Healthy Diet for Dogs, the Maze design of the slow feeder dog bowl effectively slow down your pet, stop inhaling food, eating at a slower pace, prevent obesity, bloat, regurgitation and overeating, a Great Diet Bowl.

the Special puzzle design of the slow feeding bowl will absolutely arouse your fur baby’s interest, making the meals kind of challenging but much more fun, help promoting intellectual development, recommend for small to medium dogs, puppies.

This Anti Choking Slow Feeding Bowl is great for both dry and wet food, holds up to 2 cups, easy to clean, dish washer safe.allowing for quick and hassle-free cleaning.It can withstand 100 degrees high temperature disinfection.The dog slow food bowl can be placed on the floor or on the mat. The bottom of the bowl is equipped with small rubber anti skid pads, which can effectively prevent the bowl from moving freely on the floor.

Form healthy eating habit for your dogs/cats, make meals time healthy & fun.With its unique patterned obstacles, our dog bowl effectively slows down eating speed, encouraging your dog to chew and savor their food. This promotes better nutrient absorption and reduces the risk of digestive issues.
description: Product Description Decyam Slow Eating Dog Food Bowls Anti-Gulping Dog Bowl Still worry your dogs eating too fast? As we know, speedy eaters are more likely to experience bloat, regurgitation, indigestible, the slow feeding dog bowls are designed to solve all these issues, slow down the meal time up to 10 times compared to a normal dog bowl, efficiently prevent overeating, choking and vomiting, form good eating behavior, making every meal full of challenge and fun. Reduce-Slip Rubber Feet With the anti slip pads at the bottom, the bowl will not moving around on the floor. Recommend to use with a feeding mat, will keep your floor tidy and clean. Slow Eating Dog Food Bowl Easy to Use & Clean Made by food-safe Polypropylene material, BPA, PVC & phthalate-free, will not hurt your pup’s teeth. Caution: Choking hazard, please replace when damaged Dishwasher safe, do not microwave Stack / fit inside each other when empty, save space Multiple Size and Color Available Decyam dog bowl is made of non-toxic, non-toxic material, non-slip design on the bottom prevents the food bowl from moving. The special design of this slow feeder dog bowl will fully arouse your dog's interest Make meal time a little challenging but more interesting Help promote intellectual development, the perfect gift choice for your pet.
